import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { FaSearch, FaFilter, FaReply, FaCheck, FaFlag, FaUser } from 'react-icons/fa'; const ConversationsPage = () => { const [selectedConversation, setSelectedConversation] = useState(null); const [conversations] = useState([ { id: 1, customer: 'John Doe', platform: 'Telegram', lastMessage: 'How do I reset my password?', time: '2 min ago', status: 'active', messages: [ { sender: 'John', content: 'Hi, I need help with my account', time: '10:30 AM' }, { sender: 'AI', content: 'Hello! How can I help you today?', time: '10:31 AM' }, { sender: 'John', content: 'How do I reset my password?', time: '10:32 AM' }, ] }, { id: 2, customer: 'Sarah Smith', platform: 'WhatsApp', lastMessage: 'Thank you for your help!', time: '15 min ago', status: 'resolved', messages: [ { sender: 'Sarah', content: 'I need information about your pricing', time: '09:15 AM' }, { sender: 'AI', content: 'Here are our pricing plans...', time: '09:16 AM' }, { sender: 'Sarah', content: 'Thank you for your help!', time: '09:20 AM' }, ] }, { id: 3, customer: 'Mike Johnson', platform: 'Web', lastMessage: 'This is urgent!', time: '1 hour ago', status: 'escalated', messages: [ { sender: 'Mike', content: 'This is urgent!', time: '11:00 AM' }, { sender: 'AI', content: 'I\'m escalating this to our support team', time: '11:01 AM' }, ] }, ]); const getStatusColor = (status) => { switch(status) { case 'active': return 'status-active'; case 'resolved': return 'status-resolved'; case 'escalated': return 'status-escalated'; default: return ''; } }; return (

Conversations

{conversations.map((conv) => (
setSelectedConversation(conv)} >
{conv.customer} {conv.status}
{conv.lastMessage}
{conv.platform} {conv.time}
))}
{selectedConversation ? ( <>

{selectedConversation.customer}

{selectedConversation.status}
{selectedConversation.messages.map((msg, index) => (
{msg.sender}
{msg.content}
{msg.time}
))}
) : (

Select a conversation

Choose a conversation from the list to view messages

)}
); }; export default ConversationsPage;
